key_finding: The subtask's underlying production fix (never-reuse WAL segment numbering via wal.WriteSegmentFloor in EdgeLog.TruncateNode, engine/graph/edgelog.go lines ~240-291) was ALREADY present at git_head_before_run, landed in commit ed57468 ('fix: prevent WAL segment-number reuse from silently dropping edges after compaction (issue #15, 3.1.3, second fix cycle)') and already covered by a pre-existing equivalent test, TestCompaction_SecondAppendAfterSuccessfulCompactionIsNotLost (engine/graph/compact_test.go line ~504). This run added only the exact-named acceptance test issue #49 requires; no compact.go or edgelog.go changes were made or needed.
